results.title: PostgreSQL Embedded
results.description: Embed PostgreSQL database

results.title: Embedded Postgres
results.description: Run a real Postgres database locally on Linux, OSX or Windows as part of another Go application or test, providing higher confidence than in-memory alternatives without external dependencies.

results.title: PostgresML
results.description: PostgresML is a powerful Postgres extension that enables machine learning and AI applications directly within your database, leveraging GPU acceleration and seamless integration with LLMs and RAG pipelines.

results.title: Alembic Utils
results.description: Alembic Utils is an extension for Alembic that adds support for autogenerating PostgreSQL entity types including functions, views, materialized views, triggers, and policies.

results.title: Pg-Embedded
results.description: A Node.js library for running embedded PostgreSQL instances, providing a simple and efficient way to start, manage, and interact with PostgreSQL databases directly from Node.js applications without requiring a separate installation.

results.title: Omnigres
results.description: Omnigres transforms Postgres into a developer-first application platform, enabling application logic to run within or alongside the database instance, supporting various protocols, and offering features like reactive queries and automagic APIs.

results.title: Pgcli
results.description: Postgres CLI with autocompletion and syntax highlighting

results.title: Multigres
results.description: Multigres is an adaptation of Vitess designed for use with PostgreSQL, currently in its early stages of development.

results.title: Django Postgres Extra
results.description: django-postgres-extra makes PostgreSQL's features accessible through the Django ORM, offering seamless integration for advanced functionalities like upserts, table partitioning, views, and locking.

results.title: Pgx
results.description: Build Postgres Extensions with Rust!

results.title: Ansible Role Postgres
results.description: An Ansible role that installs and manages PostgreSQL as a Docker container, wrapped in a systemd service, offering features like multiple database support, major version upgrades, and data imports.

results.title: Pg Vectorize
results.description: A Postgres extension that transforms text into embeddings for vector search and LLM applications, integrating with popular LLMs and SentenceTransformers.

results.title: PostgREST
results.description: PostgREST serves a fully RESTful API from any existing PostgreSQL database, offering a cleaner, faster, and more standards-compliant API than custom-written solutions.

results.title: PostgreSQL Unit
results.description: PostgreSQL Unit is a PostgreSQL extension that implements a datatype for SI units and derived units, enabling arithmetic operations and conversions with support for over 2500 unit definitions and SI/IEC binary prefixes.

results.title: AtomSpace Postgres
results.description: AtomSpace Postgres is a deprecated implementation for saving and restoring AtomSpace contents and individual Atoms to a PostgreSQL database.

results.title: Postgrest Go
results.description: Postgrest Go is a Golang client for PostgREST, aiming to provide an ORM-like restful interface for interacting with PostgreSQL databases.

results.title: VectorChord
results.description: Scalable, fast, and disk-friendly vector search in Postgres, the successor of pgvecto.rs.

results.title: Postgresus
results.description: Postgresus is a free, open-source, and self-hosted solution for automated PostgreSQL backups, offering flexible scheduling, multiple storage options, and smart notifications.

results.title: Postgres Meta
results.description: A RESTful API for managing Postgres, allowing fetching of tables, adding roles, running queries, and more.

results.title: PGVecto.rs
results.description: Scalable Vector Search in Postgres. Revolutionize Vector Search, not Database.

results.title: EntityFrameworkCore.SqlServer.SimpleBulks
results.description: Fast and simple bulk insert (retain client populated Ids or return db generated Ids), bulk update, bulk delete, bulk merge and bulk match for SQL Server.

results.title: pgEdge Distributed Postgres (VM Edition)
results.description: pgEdge Distributed Postgres (VM Edition) is a command-line interface (CLI) tool that simplifies the creation and management of multi-master distributed Postgres clusters in data centers or cloud accounts, providing low latency and high availability for various applications.

results.title: VSCode Neovim
results.description: Integrates a fully embedded Neovim instance into VSCode, leveraging Neovim's backend for Vim features and VSCode's native functionality for insert mode and commands.

results.title: Postgres
results.description: Supabase Postgres provides unmodified PostgreSQL with a collection of useful plugins and extensions for enhanced functionality, including hypothetical indexes, query performance analysis, and GraphQL support.

results.title: Imposm
results.description: Imposm is a high-performance OpenStreetMap data importer that reads PBF files, imports them into PostgreSQL/PostGIS, and automatically updates the database, optimized for rendering applications like tile services.

results.title: Fly.io Postgres Elixir
results.description: Fly Postgres facilitates geographically distributed Elixir applications by managing primary/replica PostgreSQL configurations on Fly.io, optimizing reads to local replicas and writes to the primary database.

results.title: Pg-mem
results.description: pg-mem is an experimental in-memory emulation of a postgres database that works in Node.js or the browser, offering features like rollback points and custom function/type registration.

results.title: PostgreSQL
results.description: PostgreSQL is an advanced object-relational database management system supporting an extended subset of the SQL standard, including transactions, foreign keys, subqueries, triggers, and user-defined types and functions.

results.title: Microsoft Entra API-Driven Inbound Provisioning
results.description: This project provides resources and samples for integrating with Microsoft Entra API-driven inbound provisioning, enabling workforce data ingestion from any system of record into Microsoft Entra ID and connected Active Directory domains.

results.title: Activerecord Import
results.description: A library for bulk insertion of data into your database using ActiveRecord.
